title: Upon The Troublesome Times.
content:
O times most bad,
    Without the scope
    Of hope
    Of better to be had!

    Where shall I go,
    Or whither run
    To shun
    This public overthrow?

    No places are,
    This I am sure,
    Secure
    In this our wasting war.

    Some storms we've past,
    Yet we must all
    Down fall,
    And perish at the last.
meaning:
"Upon The Troublesome Times." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
